RFC_Function_Module: (All SAP RFC calls via Volley JsonObjectRequest use the same pattern)
Example_Base_Host_Notes: Code builds parent as requestUrl.substring(0; requestUrl.lastIndexOf("/")). Default login URL in AppConstants: https://v2-hht-api.azurewebsites.net/api/hht/ValueXMW  =>  RFC base: https://v2-hht-api.azurewebsites.net/api/hht/noacljsonrfcadaptor?...  Body is JSON; params usually include duplicate bapiname key.
